name: Microwave Chicken with Lemon and Olives (Low Fat)
recipeIngredient: 1 onion, peeled, halved, and cut into slivers
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove the peel from lemons using a vegetable peeler in long strips. Drop the strips into boiling water and cook for 2-1/2 minutes. Remove from water.
2. When cool enough to handle, scrape any remaining white pith off the back of lemon strips. Cut into 1/8 x 2-inch slivers. Place in a bowl and toss with coarse salt. Let sit at room temperature for 1 hour.
3. Clean chicken well and remove excess fat. Cut breasts in half, removing center cartilage. Fan out the fillets on the back of breasts.
4. Place breasts in a bowl and pour 1/4 cup lemon juice over them. Let rest for 30 minutes.
5. In a microwave-safe casserole dish, combine oil and margarine (or butter). Cover and cook on high for 30 seconds.
6. Add onion, garlic, crystallized ginger, powdered sugar, and turmeric to the dish. Stir well.
7. Pour in chicken broth. Stir again.
8. Return to microwave and cook, covered, on high for 5 minutes.
9. Add lemon peel, olives, remaining lemon juice, and 2 tablespoons parsley to the casserole. Stir and cook sauce, covered, on high for 2 minutes.
10. Drain chicken. Place in the casserole dish in one layer, covering with sauce. Cook, covered, on high for 8 minutes or until breasts are tender but not overcooked.
11. Serve chicken in shallow bowls, spooning sauce and vegetables on top. Garnish with remaining parsley.
